title: Warden Behavioral Trust Record
description: Per-version, time-aware trust evaluation. NOT a static identity badge. Recomputed on every publish and reproducible from the signed inputs.

status.description: rejected == un-waived CRITICAL at intake; never exposed

provisional.description: true while the version is still earning trust through clean observation

as_of.description: observation window cutoff; trust is time-aware

inputs_digest.description: content address of the inputs, for reproducibility

rationale.description: human-readable explanation of every adjustment to the score
